seo_content:
Audacity Capital 14% OFF Deal

Audacity Capital is celebrating its 14th anniversary with an exclusive 14% discount on all trading challenges. Use code 14th at checkout to save on your evaluation fee and take your first step toward trading with one of the most established and institutionally backed prop firms in the forex space. This milestone discount is a rare opportunity to join at a reduced cost.

Audacity Capital is a UK-based proprietary trading firm with 14 years of market experience and deep institutional roots. The firm is backed by a regulated financial entity and has built a reputation for delivering professional-grade trading conditions, strong compliance practices, and a scaling program that can take successful traders all the way to $2.4 million in capital allocation.

With code 14th, you receive a 14% reduction on your initial challenge fee — a straightforward savings that reflects the firm's 14 years in operation. Beyond the discount, Audacity Capital offers a scaling plan unrivaled in the industry, allowing consistently profitable traders to grow their account from entry-level challenges up to $2.4M in total capital through a structured progression path.

Audacity Capital's trading conditions reflect their institutional background: professional risk management rules, access to a broad range of forex instruments, and conditions that reward disciplined execution over aggressive speculation. The firm's UK institutional backing provides traders with a level of security and operational credibility rarely found among newer prop firms.

To claim this offer, use the referral link above to register with Audacity Capital, select your preferred challenge tier, and enter code 14th at checkout. The 14% discount will be applied to your order total. This is a limited anniversary promotion — confirm current availability on the Audacity Capital website before purchasing.
